DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO THE JUDGE. FILED BY DEFENDANT TSOI, MINDY AND TSOI, EDMUND
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,338.27 FILED BY KIR, MEI ON AS TO DEFENDANT TSOI, MINDY AND TSOI, EDMUND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
2ND PROOF OF SERVICES TO: MINDY TSOI, DBA ARBY'S RESTAURANT AND TO: DR. EDMOND TSOI FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIR, MEI ON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSOI, MINDY AND TSOI, EDMUND $1,282.62 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,417.62, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR UNCONTESTED TAX LIABILITY OF $782.62 AND $500 DMAMGES FOR REPAIR OF EXPOSED WIRING AND RELATED ELECTRICAL ISSUES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT TSOI, MINDY AND TSOI, EDMUND
